name: kite_nearest_hostile
description: Back away from the nearest hostile while keeping distance, allowing ranged attacks or letting teammates engage
parameters: z.object({ preferredDistance: z.number().min(5).max(40).default(20).describe("Try to keep at least this many blocks between the bot and the nearest hostile"), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(6000).describe("Maximum time to stay in the kiting behavior"), retreatDistance: z.number().min(2).max(32).default(12).describe("Distance to move back when a hostile gets too close") })
